title: State-DETRAN national-base bridge: profile, layout and rejection rules
statement: The State-DETRAN bridge models a state agency acting against the national bases (RENAVAM/RENACH/RENAINF/RENAEST/SNE) ONLY — never UF-proprietary APIs. Rules DETRAN.D001–D004: an unknown UF profile yields 404 DETRAN.PROFILE.NOT_FOUND (D001); an inactive/suspended profile yields 402 DETRAN.PROFILE.INACTIVE (D002); a versaoLeiaute incompatible with the profile yields 400 DETRAN.LAYOUT.INVALID (D003); a profile still in homologation yields 402 DETRAN.BRIDGE.REJECTED (D004). A successful bridge mints a protocoloDetran linked to a protocoloNacional (situação ACEITO). Writes are idempotent and audited per INV-IDEMP-001.
rationale: State DETRANs feed and consume the national bases; the mock must model that bridge — profile activation, layout compatibility, protocol linkage — deterministically, while staying strictly on national-base semantics (the municipal/tow/yard boundary is enforced by national-extensions-mapping.md).
